description_long: This vending machine features a bold, predominantly red exterior with a rectangular form and a slightly sloped top. The front face displays a large illuminated panel with the F1 logo and a group image of Formula 1 drivers, suggesting a themed or promotional design. Below the display, there are two distinct sections: a circular area likely for product retrieval and a smaller rectangular area that may house the payment interface. The sides are mostly solid red, with a large, irregularly shaped gray cutout, possibly for maintenance or product access. The back is plain and unadorned, emphasizing the machine's utilitarian structure. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for high-traffic urban environments.
description: A modern, red vending machine with a prominent F1-themed display and distinct product retrieval and payment areas on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows a large F1-branded display panel, a circular retrieval area, and a rectangular payment section, all set against a red background.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a large, irregular gray cutout, likely for access or maintenance, with minimal additional features.
description_view_2: The rear view is entirely solid red with no visible features, panels, or branding.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a large gray cutout and a red base, with no display or branding.
attribute_display_panel: A large, rectangular digital display panel is located on the upper front, occupying most of the width and about one-third of the height, showing the F1 logo and a group image of drivers.
attribute_payment_interface: A small rectangular section below the display on the front, likely for payment, with visible geometric detailing but no clear indication of payment types.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A circular area below the display panel on the front, likely serving as the product retrieval slot, with a recessed design.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A prominent F1 logo and a group image of Formula 1 drivers are displayed on the front panel, occupying a large portion of the upper front face.
